text.title: Mobile Responsive Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a Mobile Responsive artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo founder ships a Next.js B2B SaaS. Spec pins breakpoints at 640/768/1024/1280, mobile-first cascade, container queries for the dashboard table, 44px touch min, viewport meta in _document.tsx, env(safe-area-inset-bottom) on the bottom action bar, all hover menus replaced with tap-to-open. Mobile conversion rate +18% the next month.

list.item: Step 1 — prerequisites_ok=true; all input refs reachable.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
Step 4 — validator script exits 0; no violations.

section.title: Outcome
section.p: The artefact is auditable by a downstream reviewer without re-deriving the reasoning. Every non-trivial field traces back to an evidence row; rejected fields surface as structured skip-with-reason instead of polluting the library with degraded output.
